chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 138 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 10.05.2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI
